title: ScreenActivity
description: A single held location / street segment of screen activity within a film permit — the on-the-ground unit of a shoot. Derived from the Film Permits 'ParkingHeld' field (tg4x-b46p) exploded into individual street closures, enriched with the DOT filming-permit street view (c2az-nhru). One FilmPermit holds many ScreenActivity locations across boroughs, precincts, and community boards.

streetName.description: Street being held ('STREETNAME' on DOT twin).

fromStreet.description: Cross street the closure starts at (parsed from 'ParkingHeld' / 'STREETNUMBERFROM').

toStreet.description: Cross street the closure ends at (parsed from 'ParkingHeld' / 'STREETNUMBERTO').

placement.description: Side/placement of the hold ('PLACEMENT' on DOT twin).

streetClosure.description: Whether the street is fully closed ('STREETCLOSURE').
